use_cases: Primary action trigger for profile dropdown menus in dashboard interfaces
Form submission buttons with multiple visual variants for different contexts
Navigation trigger buttons with hover and focus states for accessibility
ai_summary: A flexible button component with CVA-powered variants including default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link styles. Built on Radix UI's Slot for composition, featuring ring-based focus states and disabled opacity. Used as the interactive trigger element within profile dropdown navigation systems.
